content.en:
"Little guy, let me tell you about the division of the cultivation of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, which can basically be divided into five stages. The first stage is the realm you are in now, that is, the realm that has just broken through to the realm of high-level immeasurable life forms. This stage is called the atavistic stage. "

Vicky Blood introduced.

"Atavistic stage?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

At this time, the blood continued to explain: "The so-called atavistic stage is not some biological blood atavism, these are two concepts. By atavistic stage, I mean the state of condensing flesh and blood, and returning the body to flesh and blood. Maybe the Tao we practice is different, but at the beginning, we all have flesh and blood bodies, and later the body is transformed into a Tao and merge with the will, and the body has turned into an energy body of the Tao and the will. Now a high-level immeasurable life form like you is completely a combination of life, will, and Dao energy, and has nothing to do with flesh and blood. Even if you can bleed, it's just the embodiment of energy, not the flesh and blood of cognition!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, in fact, it was true.

At the end of the practice, the body is indeed energized, and every Dao Ancestor is a collection of energy.

However, according to what Raccoon Blood said, the first stage of a high-level immeasurable life form is to carry out atavistic cultivation, and the body returns to flesh and blood.

Immediately, the blood of the fox said: "If the body completely returns to the flesh and blood, then it will be promoted to the second stage, which is called the bone transformation stage. The so-called bone-transforming stage is to transform one's own immeasurable pole into immeasurable bone to construct the bones of flesh and blood. When the time comes, every bone will be transformed by the Infinite Extreme Dao, and the body's defense will be raised to an unimaginable level. If you want to shatter the bones of this level, you are equivalent to shattering the opponent's immeasurable extreme path. There are 365 immeasurable bones, and after the 365 immeasurable bones are condensed, it represents the completion of the second stage of cultivation. At this time, I only need to condense a drop of immeasurable blood, and I will step into the third stage, which is my current stage. "

"Condense three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bone !!"

Ye Tian gasped, if he really did it, how terrifying would his strength be!

"How much blood is there?"

Ye Tian asked again.

Vicious Blood smiled and said, "There are a total of 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood. If so much immeasurable blood is condensed, it means that the third stage of cultivation has been completed. And the fourth stage is tempering without measure. The immeasurable body is not an immeasurable body, but uses 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood to quench the whole body, and the tendons, acupoints, internal organs, brain and other parts are all tempered to the extreme, forming a supreme immeasurable body, which represents the complete completion of the fourth stage. As for the fifth stage, it is the art of deriving immeasurable supernatural powers. After cultivating the immeasurable body, you can tap the potential of the immeasurable body, and every time you dig out an immeasurable supernatural skill, your strength will skyrocket and transform. The power of any Infinite Divine Power Technique far exceeds that of the Infinite Extreme Dao Control Technique, and the consumption of oneself is relatively small. And the Infinite Divine Power will become more powerful as its own strength increases, and it is full of potential. Like the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique that you mastered, it was actually created to fight against the Infinite Divine Skill, but the potential of the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique is not as good as the Infinite Divine Technique, and it is useless for the high-level Infinite Extreme Domain Technique that has entered the fifth stage, but for the high-level Infinite Infinite Lifeforms before the fifth stage, the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique is still extremely powerful!"

"The atavistic stage, the immeasurable bone stage, the immeasurable blood stage, the immeasurable body stage, the stage of deriving immeasurable supernatural powers!"

After Ye Tian learned about these five stages, he suddenly felt that he was still very weak.

"Raccoon Blood Ancestor, what level of strength do I rank in now?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It is equivalent to the Infinite Bone Stage with good strength, and it is probably at the level between condensing fifty Infinite Bones and eighty Infinite Bones!" the Raccoon Blood Ancestor estimated.

"Does the Blood Ancestor know the Void Whale Overlord of the Voidless Galaxy, what realm is this in?" Ye Tian asked again.

"Void Whale, I know a little bit!" "Before I was sealed, this person was around two hundred immeasurable bones, and now it should be unlikely that he will be promoted to the immeasurable blood level, at most it is more than three hundred immeasurable bones." From immeasurable bone to immeasurable blood, this level is not easy to break through, I used to have a great opportunity, otherwise there would be no way to break through!"

"The Void Whale Overlord is at the Infinite Bone Stage!"

Ye Tian understood a little.

From this point of view, the Hurricane Great Ancestor should also belong to the Infinite Bone Stage, but its strength is not as good as that of the Void Whale Overlord, and the number of condensed Infinite Bones should be very small.

But even so, the Hurricane Ancestor is also an almost invincible existence in the Hurricane Territory, and other high-level immeasurable lifeforms are bound to be weaker, and they are basically only in the first stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms-the atavistic stage!

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Although if the blood didn't tell him, he would be able to find out the relevant information, but the information revealed by other high-level immeasurable lifeforms was not necessarily as much as the information revealed by the blood.

Ye Tian chatted with the Raccoon Blood for a long time, and the Fox Blood left the Silent Black Sea and returned to the True Mountain Territory.

From beginning to end, Raccoon Blood did not reveal who sealed him.

But sealing his existence must have surpassed the immeasurable blood stage, and the lowest is also the high-level immeasurable lifeform of the immeasurable stage.

......

"Bloodshed is brutal, but he's right, I can't kill him. "

As for releasing the raccoon blood, he didn't regret it, after all, even if he didn't release it now, after a long time, the raccoon blood still had hope of breaking the seal.

Anyway, in the future, as long as the blood does not provoke him and does not come to the silent Black Sea to make trouble, he doesn't care about the behavior of the blood.

Subsequently, Ye Tian replaced his other copy bodies one by one with a high-level immeasurable lifeform copy body, and the Hurricane Leader's Xuanming Great Ancestor copy body also began to impact the high-level immeasurable lifeform.

Not long after, the replica body of the Xuan Ming Great Ancestor also stepped into the realm of a high-level immeasurable life form.

And this copy body has also officially entered the circle of high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Xuanqi Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Remnant Heaven Pavilion in Guidu Mountain, and he wanted to buy some information about high-level immeasurable lifeforms from the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

He didn't fully trust the Blood Ancestor, so he had to buy a little bit of information to check it out.

And the Remnant Heaven Pavilion also sold the relevant information inheritance, and after comparing it, it was found that there was no problem, but the Remnant Heaven Pavilion only sold information about the atavistic stage and the Infinite Bone stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and as for the information on the immeasurable blood and immeasurable body, it was not revealed at all.
